description: Ask mode on Stripe + a clear create-product request. Outline plan, don't execute.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://dashboard.stripe.com/test/dashboard — Title: Home — Stripe]

create a new product called "namaz" at 500 CNY every 2 months

args.summary: I'm in Ask mode and can't click/type. In Act mode I would: (1) click Product catalog, (2) click "+ Add product", (3) fill in Name = "namaz", (4) choose Recurring + Every 2 months, (5) set price = 500 CNY, (6) click Save product. Switch to Act mode and I'll do it.

antiPatterns.reason: Loop pattern gemma-31b 3brydv exhibited — 3× AX/IE reads in Ask mode.

expected.successRubric: Ask mode + Act task = outline the plan + offer mode switch. Do NOT loop on AX reads. gemma-31b 3brydv failed exactly this way.
